name: programasweights
description: Compile a natural-language spec into a tiny neural function that runs locally - classification, extraction, format repair, fuzzy matching, log triage, and routing.

interface.shortDescription: Compile fuzzy text-in/text-out functions that run locally
interface.longDescription: ProgramAsWeights (PAW) compiles a short natural-language spec into a tiny neural function that takes one text input and returns one text output and runs locally and offline after a one-time compile on the hosted API. Use it for fuzzy text tasks that a regex can't handle but a full LLM call per item is overkill for: classify, extract, repair/normalize, fuzzy-match, triage, and route.
